develop.title: Develop with AI
develop.subtitle: An agent that helps turn your idea into a script / caption / storyboard
develop.errorBudget: Monthly budget reached. Conversations resume next month.
develop.emptyHint: The agent will write the first message in a moment
develop.messagesLimit: Conversation reached its limit — close and start a new one if needed

empty.title: Space for your ideas
empty.subtitle: Every win started with one thought. Begin with a question:

prompts.p2: What do people ask you most?
prompts.p3: What do you wish someone had told you a year ago?

why.whyPlaceholder: Write to yourself — no editing. This will return to you in reminders.
why.forWhomPlaceholder: Describe your audience, even if it's just one person you imagine.

reminders.denied: Permission denied. Change it in your browser settings.
reminders.notSupported: This browser does not support push notifications
reminders.testSent: Notification sent. Check that it arrived.
reminders.scheduledTodo: Auto-scheduling arrives in Milestone 6 (depends on hosting)

copy.title: Writing
copy.subtitle: Give an idea or context. Get a caption, 3 hooks, and hashtags.
copy.ideaPlaceholder: What do you want to write? Video content, free context, or an idea from your idea board.
copy.caption: Caption
copy.feedbackSubtitle: Explain in a sentence or two. We'll save it and feed it into every future generation.
copy.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g., "Too formal", "I don't use those emojis", "Doesn't connect to my audience"
copy.feedbackSaved: Feedback saved. The next generation will improve.
copy.blockedSubtitle: The app hit 100% of the monthly AI budget. The budget resets at the start of next month, or you can raise it in settings.
copy.warningBanner: Monthly budget is nearly used up ({percent}% used)

analyze.title: Video check
analyze.subtitle: Upload a raw video before posting. Get a full diagnostic — should you post, when, and where.
analyze.uploadCta: Pick a video from your gallery
analyze.tooLarge: File is over 200MB. Compress it before uploading.
analyze.extractFailed: Couldn't extract frames from the video. The codec may not be supported.

budget.resetInfo: Budget resets at the start of each month

swipes.title: Style
swipes.no_categories_or_creators: Pick a category or add a creator to get started.

addLink.label: Paste a link
addLink.placeholder: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/... or any YouTube video link
addLink.errorFailed: Couldn't fetch this link. Try another.
addLink.hint: Best with YouTube Shorts. Instagram/TikTok will work too if they have a public preview.

queue.emptyHint: Paste a link above to add content to swipe on

swipes.tip: Swipe right = I want this. Left = not for me. Arrow keys also work.

mirror.title: This week
mirror.subtitle: What your tracked channels published this week, what you created, what is stuck — all in one view.

empty.title: The mirror is still filling up
empty.subtitle: Start creating — patterns will emerge quickly. Meanwhile, questions to sit with:

prompts.p1: What style feels most natural to you?
prompts.p2: Who are you as a creator, in 3 sentences?
prompts.p3: What do people say you're good at?

mirror.noContentThisWeek: Nothing this week yet. Then again — today still counts as this week.
mirror.noChannelUploads: No new uploads in your tracked channels this week. Add channels in "Channel analysis".

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: YouTube videos to help you grow as a creator
learn.empty: No videos found in this category
learn.savedEmpty: No saved videos yet. Mark ★ on anything useful.
learn.errorApi: YouTube fetch failed. Check your API key or daily quota.

analytics.title: Private metrics
analytics.subtitle: Enter the numbers the public YouTube API does not expose — CTR, retention, watch time. Public stats like views and likes are fetched automatically on the "Channel analysis" page.

empty.title: No data to analyze yet
empty.subtitle: After you mark an idea as published, come here to log views, likes, and shares.

competitor.title: Add a channel
competitor.subtitle: Paste a link, handle (@name), or YouTube channel ID

errors.ai_failed: Analysis failed. Try again in a moment.
errors.parse_failed: AI returned an unexpected format. Try again.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: We'll send a magic link to your email
auth.checkInbox: Open your email and click the link.

setup.title: Initial setup required
setup.missingAnthropic: Anthropic API key is missing from .env.local

wizard.title: Initial setup
wizard.subtitle: A few minutes and you're ready for real work. Anything already set up is marked ✓
wizard.restartHint: After updating .env.local — restart the dev server (Ctrl+C, then npm run dev)
wizard.refreshHint: Once all keys are entered and the server is back — refresh this page to see everything turn green

supabase.title: Supabase — Database + Auth
supabase.description: The foundation of the app. Stores your ideas, swipes, analytics. Free up to 500MB.
supabase.step1: Open supabase.com → New Project. Pick a name, region (Frankfurt or London recommended), set DB password
supabase.step2: Once project ready, go to SQL Editor → New query → paste all the SQL below → Run.
supabase.step3: Storage → create 2 private buckets: idea-images and videos
supabase.step4: Project Settings → API. Copy the 3 keys, paste into .env.local as shown below
supabase.step5: Authentication → URL Configuration. Add http://localhost:3000 to Site URL

anthropic.title: Anthropic — AI agents
anthropic.description: Powers the copy agent, video analysis, and idea-development chat. Budget capped at $50/month.
anthropic.step1: Open console.anthropic.com → Settings → API Keys → Create Key
anthropic.step2: Important: in Limits — set Spending Limit to $50 to never accidentally exceed
anthropic.step3: Copy the key (shown only once!) to .env.local

youtube.title: YouTube Data API — Learning library
youtube.description: Optional. Pulls educational videos from YouTube for the Learn page.
youtube.step1: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Library. Enable YouTube Data API v3
youtube.step2: Credentials → Create Credentials → API Key. Copy to .env.local

openai.title: OpenAI Whisper — Voice transcription
openai.description: Optional. Enables voice recording of ideas (auto-transcribed to text).
openai.step1: platform.openai.com → API keys → Create new secret key

vapid.title: VAPID Keys — Push reminders
vapid.description: Optional. Required to send push notifications to the browser.
vapid.step1: Open a terminal in the project folder and run:
vapid.step2: Copy the two values shown to .env.local (NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY and VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY)

wizard.allDone: Everything is set up! Click here to go back to the app

demo.title: Demo mode
demo.subtitle: You're seeing sample data. Connect Supabase in .env.local to save for real
demo.saveBlocked: Demo mode — connect Supabase to save

offline.queued: Will save when you're back online
offline.queuedIdea: Idea saved locally — will sync automatically

channels.title: Channel analysis
channels.subtitle: Paste a YouTube link — yours or anyone's — and get public stats + AI insights on what is working, what is not, and what to do next. No OAuth.
channels.emptyState: No channels yet. Paste a link above to get started.

youtube.inline_prompt: Paste a link to your YouTube channel to see your data
youtube.no_videos_this_week: No new uploads this week — what are you cooking?
youtube.quota_exceeded: Reached today's YouTube API limit. Fresh data will be back tomorrow.
